title: Implement verbose dynamics toggle (v key)
description: v key in detail view toggles verbose_dynamics bool in WerkApp. When true, show all 13 dynamics: add Oscillation (reversals, magnitude), Resolution (velocity, trend), Orientation (ratios), CompensatingStrategy (type, persistence), AssimilationDepth (depth, frequency), HorizonDrift (type, change count, net shift). When false, show only 5 key dynamics.

title: Load tensions and compute TensionRow list
description: In WerkApp::init, discover workspace via werk-shared, open store, create DynamicsEngine. Load all tensions. Compute dynamics for each. Build Vec<TensionRow> with id, desired, phase badge, movement arrow, horizon, urgency value. Sort into urgency tiers: URGENT (>0.75 or past horizon), ACTIVE (rest), NEGLECTED (neglect detected). Store in WerkApp state.

title: Implement help overlay (? key, context-sensitive)
description: ? key shows help overlay using ftui Help/HelpRegistry widgets. Context-sensitive: shows keybindings relevant to current view (dashboard keys differ from detail keys differ from agent keys). Esc dismisses. Register all keybindings per view.

title: Create werk-shared crate with extracted modules
description: Create werk-shared crate. Extract workspace.rs (workspace discovery), prefix.rs (pure logic, no dialoguer), error.rs (shared error types), config loading. Add to workspace Cargo.toml. Both werk-cli and werk-tui will depend on this.

title: Render Detail view: mutation history and children list
description: In detail view, show last 10 mutations as a List. Each row: relative timestamp, field name in brackets, old_value arrow new_value. Show children as navigable List below mutations: short ID, phase badge, movement arrow, desired text. Enter on child navigates to that child's detail view.

title: Implement j/k navigation and q to quit
description: Handle keyboard input in Normal mode. j/Down moves selection down. k/Up moves selection up. q sends Cmd::quit(). Ctrl-C sends Cmd::quit(). Map ftui::Event::Key to Msg variants. Update selected index in WerkApp state, re-render.

title: Parse structured YAML responses and display mutation suggestions
description: When agent response received: display in LogViewer. Parse with StructuredResponse::from_response() (reuse agent_response.rs from werk-shared). If structured YAML found, extract mutations and display as selectable List. Each item shows summary + reasoning. Three options: Apply all (a key), Review each (Tab to cycle, Enter to accept/skip), Cancel (Esc).

title: Phase 2: Read-Only Navigation
description: Detail view, tree view, filter cycling, verbose dynamics toggle. Full forest exploration without editing.

title: Create werk-tui crate with Model skeleton
description: Create werk-tui crate. Add to workspace Cargo.toml. Depend on sd-core, werk-shared, ftui. Define WerkApp struct implementing ftui::Model trait. Define Msg enum with From<ftui::Event>. Implement stub init/update/view. Verify it compiles.

title: Implement delete (Del key) with auto-reparent
description: Del key in detail view shows confirmation with tension desired text. Enter calls store delete. Auto-reparent children to deleted tension's parent (same as CLI rm behavior). Emit Msg::TensionDeleted, reload list, navigate back to dashboard, toast.

title: Wire entry point: no args launches TUI, args launch CLI
description: Modify werk-cli/src/main.rs: if no CLI args and stdin is a terminal, call werk_tui::run(). Otherwise parse with clap and dispatch as before. Add werk-tui as dependency of werk-cli. werk_tui::run() creates WerkApp, calls App::fullscreen(app).run().

title: Verify Phase 4: events fire, toasts render, urgency updates
description: Transition events fire correctly when creating tensions and mutating until patterns emerge. Toasts appear and auto-dismiss. Urgency bars update over time. No performance issues with periodic recomputation of all tensions.

title: Wire view switching: 1/2/t/Enter/Esc navigation
description: Global keys work in all views: 1 switches to Dashboard, 2 or t switches to Tree. Enter in Dashboard/Tree opens Detail for selected tension. Esc in Detail/Tree returns to Dashboard. Navigation state (selected index, filter) preserved when switching views.

title: Remove TOON output format and toon-format dependency
description: Delete TOON variant from Output enum. Remove --toon flag from clap. Remove toon-format from Cargo.toml. Remove is_toon(), print_toon() and related methods. Delete tests referencing TOON.

title: Render Agent view with LogViewer and pinned context
description: Implement view_agent(). Split layout: LogViewer widget (top, scrolling) for agent output. Panel (bottom, pinned) showing tension context: desired, actual, phase, movement, urgency. g key from detail view opens agent view. Esc returns to detail.

title: Build TextInput overlay system
description: Build reusable TextInput overlay system. When InputMode is not Normal, render a Panel at bottom of current view containing ftui TextInput widget. All keyboard input captured by TextInput until Enter (submit) or Esc (cancel). On submit, emit appropriate Msg. On cancel, set InputMode back to Normal. Overlay does not switch views -- renders on top of current view.

title: Phase 5: Agent Integration
description: Run AI agents from within the TUI. Agent view with LogViewer, structured YAML response parsing, mutation review.

title: Render Tree view with ftui Tree widget
description: Implement view_tree(). Use ftui Tree widget. Build tree data from sd_core::Forest. Each node: phase badge, movement arrow, short ID, desired text, horizon, urgency bar. Sort roots and children by horizon (earliest first, None last). j/k navigates, Enter opens detail, Esc returns to dashboard. Summary footer: Total/Active/Resolved/Released counts.

title: Phase 6: Polish
description: Auto-init, command palette, search, empty states, responsive layout, help overlay.

title: Implement search (fuzzy filter over tensions)
description: Implement text search over tension desired and actual fields. Search input filters dashboard list to matching tensions in real-time. Enter navigates to selected result. Esc clears search and restores full list. Search state cleared on view switch.

title: Wire EventBus to TUI Messages
description: In WerkApp, subscribe to DynamicsEngine's EventBus. On each sd_core::Event received, convert to Msg::DynamicsEvent and process in update(). Map events to Toast messages: OscillationDetected, ResolutionAchieved, NeglectDetected, UrgencyThresholdCrossed, ConflictDetected, LifecycleTransition, HorizonDriftDetected, CompensatingStrategyDetected.

title: Remove dialoguer and owo-colors from CLI
description: Remove dialoguer dependency from werk-cli. Remove owo-colors dependency. CLI becomes plain text + JSON only. Human-facing color moves to TUI.

title: Render Detail view: 5 key dynamics with ProgressBar
description: In detail view, show 5 key dynamics below info panel: Phase (text), Movement (arrow + text), Magnitude (ProgressBar 0-1.0), Urgency (ProgressBar 0-100%, only with horizon), Conflict and Neglect (text, only when detected). Use Rule separator. Call compute_all_dynamics via DynamicsEngine.

title: Implement reality update (r key)
description: r key sets InputMode::EditReality(tension_id). TextInput pre-filled with current actual value. Enter commits: call engine.store().update_actual(). Emit Msg::RealityUpdated. Recompute dynamics. Show Toast 'Reality updated'. Set InputMode back to Normal.

title: Implement Toast notifications with auto-dismiss
description: Implement Toast notification rendering using ftui Toast/NotificationQueue widgets. Store Vec<Toast> in WerkApp. Each toast: message text, severity (info/warning/alert), timestamp. Auto-dismiss after 5 seconds via Cmd::tick. Color-coded by severity. Render as overlay in top-right corner.

title: Phase 0: Foundation Cleanup
description: Clean the codebase before building on it. Remove dead code, consolidate duplicates, extract shared crate.

title: Render Dashboard view with List, Badge, ProgressBar
description: Implement view_dashboard(). Use ftui Panel for outer frame. Status bar at top with Badge widgets: count of past-horizon, neglected, active, resolved. Tension list in center using ftui List widget. Each row: selection indicator, phase badge [G/A/C/M], movement arrow, desired text (truncated), horizon text, urgency ProgressBar. Group headers (URGENT/ACTIVE/NEGLECTED) as Rule widgets. Keybinding bar at bottom with StatusLine.

title: Implement resolve (R) and release (X) with confirmation
description: R key in detail view shows inline confirmation: 'Resolve [tension desired]? (Enter/Esc)'. Enter calls engine.store().update_status(Resolved). X key same pattern for Release. Both: recompute dynamics, toast, return to dashboard if tension no longer matches current filter.

title: Implement command palette (/ key)
description: / or : key opens ftui CommandPalette widget. Register all available actions with descriptions: add, reality, desire, resolve, release, note, horizon, move, delete, tree, dashboard, quit, help. Fuzzy search filters as user types. Enter executes selected action. Esc cancels.

title: Verify Phase 1: TUI launches, CLI still works
description: TUI launches and shows tensions from .werk/ store. j/k navigation works. q quits and restores terminal (RAII). All existing CLI commands still work: werk add, werk tree, werk show, etc.

title: Implement add tension (a key, multi-step)
description: a key sets InputMode::AddTension(AddStep::Desired). Multi-step: Step 1 TextInput for desired. Enter advances to Step 2 (actual). Enter on step 2 creates tension via engine.create_tension(). If in detail view, auto-set parent to current tension via create_tension_with_parent(). Tab from step 2 advances to optional parent picker and horizon input. Emit Msg::TensionCreated, reload list, toast.

title: Implement live dynamics recomputation with sibling propagation
description: After any mutation (reality, desire, resolve, release, add, delete, move), recompute dynamics for affected tension AND its siblings (for conflict detection). Engine tracks PreviousDynamics across computations, so transition events now fire correctly. Add Sparkline widget in detail view showing urgency trend over recent mutations.

title: Verify Phase 2: full navigation flow
description: Full navigation flow works: dashboard -> detail -> tree -> dashboard. All views render correctly at various terminal sizes. Dynamics display correctly for tensions with and without horizons. Filter cycling works in dashboard and tree.

title: Implement periodic 60s tick for time-dependent updates
description: Cmd::tick(Duration::from_secs(60)) fires Msg::Tick every minute. On tick: re-render to update relative timestamps. Re-evaluate urgency for all tensions with horizons. If any urgency crosses threshold between ticks, emit UrgencyThresholdCrossed event (which triggers toast via T41 wiring).

title: Implement auto-init welcome screen
description: On TUI launch, if no .werk/ found: show welcome Panel with explanation of werk. Two options: 'Create workspace here (.werk/)' or 'Create global (~/.werk/)'. Enter selects, creates workspace, proceeds to empty dashboard. No werk init ceremony needed.

title: Apply agent-suggested mutations to store
description: Apply mutations from agent suggestions. Reuse apply_single_mutation logic from run.rs (extracted to werk-shared). Handle: UpdateActual, CreateChild, AddNote, UpdateStatus, UpdateDesired. After applying, recompute dynamics, show toast per mutation applied. Update detail view state.

title: Verify Phase 0: tests pass, clippy clean
description: All existing tests pass. cargo clippy clean. No functional regressions. CLI commands produce correct output with simplified formatting.

title: Implement horizon set (h key)
description: h key in detail view opens TextInput for horizon value. Accept formats: '2026', '2026-03', '2026-03-15', '2026-03-15T14:00'. Parse via sd_core::Horizon. On invalid input, show inline error text. On valid, call store update, recompute dynamics, toast.

title: Run agent subprocess via Cmd::task() (non-blocking)
description: Use Cmd::task() to run agent subprocess in background thread. Subprocess spawned with tension context in env vars (WERK_TENSION_ID, WERK_CONTEXT, WERK_WORKSPACE). Capture stdout. When complete, return Msg::AgentResponseReceived(tension_id, response_text). UI stays responsive during execution.

title: Implement desire update (d key)
description: d key sets InputMode::EditDesire(tension_id). Same pattern as reality: pre-fill, Enter commits via engine.store().update_desired(), emit Msg::DesireUpdated, recompute, toast.

title: Verify Phase 5: full agent loop works end-to-end
description: Agent launches from TUI detail view. Prompt sent, Spinner shown during execution. Response displays in LogViewer. Structured mutations parsed and shown as selectable list. Apply all and review each flows work. Dynamics update after agent-suggested changes. Fallback to plain text display for non-YAML responses.

title: Phase 4: Live Dynamics & Events
description: Wire EventBus to FrankenTUI Messages. Toast notifications for dynamics transitions. Periodic urgency refresh.

title: Simplify CLI show to 5 key dynamics
description: CLI show command default output shows only 5 dynamics: Phase, Magnitude, Urgency, Neglect, Movement. Remove the verbose dynamics wall (all 13 printed). Use relative_time() for timestamps. --json still outputs everything.

title: Verify Phase 6: complete first-use flow, all polish works
description: Fresh install -> first launch -> auto-init -> add first tension -> update reality -> resolve -> full workflow. Works in terminals from 40 cols to 200+ cols. Help overlay accurate for every view. Command palette finds all actions. Search filters correctly.

title: Implement add note (n key)
description: n key opens single TextInput for note text. Enter commits: record_mutation with field='note'. Emit Msg::NoteAdded. Toast 'Note added'.

title: Render Detail view: tension info panel
description: Implement view_detail(). Panel with tension title + short ID. Fields: Desired, Actual, Status, Created (relative time), Horizon (with days remaining), Parent ID. Use Paragraph widgets for fields. Esc key returns to dashboard (Msg::Back sets active_view to Dashboard).

title: Implement filter cycling (f/R keys)
description: f key cycles filter: Active -> All -> Resolved -> Released -> Active. R key quick-toggles resolved/released visibility. Store current filter in WerkApp. Rebuild tension_list on filter change, re-sort by urgency. Show current filter name in status bar Badge. Works in both Dashboard and Tree views.

title: Implement responsive layout for small terminals
description: Handle terminals from 40 cols to 200+ cols gracefully. Truncate desired/actual text based on available width. Hide urgency bar below 60 cols (show percentage text instead). Hide horizon column below 50 cols. Test with various terminal sizes.

title: Implement empty states for all views
description: Dashboard with no tensions: Panel with 'No tensions yet. Press a to create your first.' Detail with no children: omit children section entirely (no empty header). Tree with no tensions: same as dashboard empty state. Agent with no response yet: show prompt instructions.

title: Consolidate duplicate code into werk-shared
description: Extract truncate() into werk-shared (currently duplicated in show.rs, run.rs, agent_response.rs). Add relative_time() function for human-readable timestamps. Extract ContextResult struct (duplicated in context.rs and run.rs) into werk-shared.

title: Phase 1: Scaffold TUI
description: Get a working FrankenTUI app that displays tensions read-only. Dashboard view, basic navigation, entry point wiring.

title: Implement agent prompt input with Spinner
description: TextInput at bottom of agent view for prompt entry. Enter sends prompt. Build full prompt with context markdown (reuse build_context_markdown from run.rs, extracted to werk-shared). Resolve agent command from config (reuse resolve_agent_command). Show Spinner widget while agent runs.

title: Verify Phase 3: all CRUD works, persistence verified
description: All CRUD operations work from TUI. Mutations persisted (verify by opening CLI in another terminal: werk show <id>). Dynamics recompute after every change. Toasts appear for significant events. No data loss on rapid edits.

title: Phase 3: Inline Editing
description: Full CRUD from within the TUI via TextInput overlays. Never leave the application.

title: Implement move/reparent (m key) with tension picker
description: m key in detail view opens a tension picker overlay. Show filtered list of all tensions (exclude self and descendants). j/k to navigate, Enter to select new parent, Esc to cancel. On select: call store reparent, reload forest, recompute dynamics, toast.
